title: mosiera elliptica subsp. matanzasia
intro: Mosiera elliptica subsp. matanzasia is a subspecies of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the island of Cuba. It is also known as Cuban pennyroyal, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and supporting digestive health. The leaves and stems of Mosiera elliptica subsp. matanzasia can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
